creator: Jaehyuk@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have a DL 140G3 Server.
It hase Embeded RAID Controller. HDDs are controlled by them.

But FreeBsd 6.2 is not available for that RAID Controller.
FreeBsd cannot find HDD and cannot understanding Controller.

So, I have some questions....

How can I install the FreeBsd on DL140 G3 Using RAID Controller.
Please tell me, Installation Skills...
